mapper.select: SELECT status FROM partner WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT partner_id as partnerId, member_id as memberId, partner_name as partnerName, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, contact_email as contactEmail, has_exp as expStatus, business_number as businessNumber, partner_intro as partnerIntro, status, reject_reason as rejectReason, created_at as createdAt FROM partner WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
